sourceMovie.title: Cold Storage
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Cold Storage (2026) as a horror theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The horror and science fiction blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Slither
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Cold Storage clicked for you, Slither (2006) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and science fiction, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Cold Storage?
faq.answer: Try Slither, World War Z, 10 Cloverfield Lane—each shares DNA with Cold Storage while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Cold Storage?
faq.answer: Cold Storage (2026) is best described as Horror, Science Fiction, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Cold Storage worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
